## Astro CV Website Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Astro CV portfolio website with GitHub Pages deployment
- [x] Scaffold the Astro Project
- [x] Customize the Project with CV content and styling
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

This is an Astro-based CV/portfolio website configured for GitHub Pages deployment.
